channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Smart Yogurt Choices for Longevity: A Dietitian's Guide
item.description: This article provides a comprehensive guide to selecting yogurt that supports long-term health, focusing on nutritional value and dietary benefits. It explains the differences between regular, Greek, ...

item.title: Argentina's Falklands Banner Sparks FIFA Disciplinary Action Amid Sovereignty Dispute
item.description: The White House has defended Argentina’s men’s football team over the controversial Falklands banner waved by players during the World Cup semi-final against England, asserting their right to free spe...

item.title: Defense Secretary Teodoro Condemns China's AI-Generated Video Depicting Filipinos as Monkeys
item.description: Defense Secretary Gilberto Teodoro Jr. has rejected China's Foreign Ministry claim that an AI-generated China Daily video portraying Filipinos as monkeys was not a government act. Teodoro stated that ...

item.title: KMTC Nursing Class Honors Coordinator with Heartfelt Gesture
item.description: Nursing students at Kenya Medical Training College (KMTC) in Kabarnet, Baringo County, surprised their class coordinator with a heartfelt gesture ahead of their 2026 graduation. The students organized...

item.title: Trump's Midterms Threat: Alleged Election Rigging and Political Manipulation
item.description: The article analyzes former President Donald Trump's speech addressing his base, which the author describes as a 'horror show' aimed at rigging the 2026 midterms. Trump's claims of election fraud, des...

item.title: Divorce and Financial Struggles Lead to Unconventional Living Arrangement
item.description: The article discusses a man in his mid-40s navigating a devastating divorce that has left him nearly destitute. With a 3-year-old child to raise alone, he made the difficult decision to take in his fi...

item.title: Melbourne's 16-point win over North Melbourne marred by player injuries
item.description: Melbourne's AFL team secured a 13.14 (92) to 11.10 (76) victory over North Melbourne, marking their 12th win of the season. However, the match was overshadowed by injuries to key players. Defender Dan...

item.title: Police arrest four over mob killing of young man in Uyo
item.description: The Nigeria Police Force has arrested four individuals suspected of participating in the brutal mob killing of Emmanuel Effiong, a 21-year-old man who was allegedly beaten to death in Uyo. According t...

item.title: Samia Skills Program Boosts Kilosa's Health and Governance
item.description: The Samia Skills Formalisation Programme, aimed at enhancing vocational training and employment opportunities, has exceeded its target by providing skills development to over 5,500 individuals. This i...

item.title: Lacson Accuses Cayetano of P6.79-B Budget Insertions in 2025 GAA
item.description: Senator Ping Lacson recently accused Senator Alan Peter Cayetano of allegedly inserting P6.79 billion into the 2025 General Appropriations Act (GAA) through a controversial practice known as 'live-sel...

item.title: Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange Reports 10.75% Rise in Equity Turnover to TZS 177.04 Billion, with TCCL Leading Gainers
item.description: The Dar es Salaam Stock Exchange (DSE) recorded a significant increase in equity turnover during Week 29 of 2026, reaching TZS 177.04 billion—a +10.75% week-on-week growth. This surge was driven by 63...

item.title: India's Vikram-1 Rocket Launch Rescheduled to July 18
item.description: The launch of Vikram-1, India's first privately developed orbital-class rocket, has been delayed and rescheduled. Originally planned for July 18 at 11:30 am IST from the Satish Dhawan Space Centre in ...

item.title: Kenya Weather Forecast: Cold Spells and Rainfall Expected in Over 20 Counties Today
item.description: The Kenya Meteorological Department has issued a weather update for Saturday, July 18, warning that Nairobi and 19 other counties will experience rainfall. Central and eastern regions will have cool, ...

item.title: Diver Injured in Shark Attack Off Bruny Island, Tasmania
item.description: A 31-year-old male diver sustained non-life-threatening injuries after being bitten by a shark off Bruny Island, Tasmania. The incident occurred on Saturday morning while the man was spearfishing appr...

item.title: Tsitsikamma Suspension Bridge Closed for Final Refurbishment
item.description: The Tsitsikamma Suspension Bridge at Storms River Mouth, part of the Garden Route National Park, will be closed from July 20 to July 31, 2026, for the final phase of a major refurbishment project. SAN...

item.title: Canadian Actor Mimics Tom Cruise's Maverick Persona for a Living
item.description: Jerome LeBlanc, a 38-year-old Canadian actor from Quebec City, has been embodying the iconic Tom Cruise character 'Maverick' from the Top Gun franchise for 17 years. While he maintains a safe and grou...

item.title: Government agrees to rename public institutions after police martyrs' families end protest
item.description: The families of 27 policemen killed in a terrorist attack in Balochistan's Ziarat district ended their 10-day sit-in in Quetta after reaching an agreement with the provincial government. The protest, ...

item.title: Femi Fowora’s The Weight of Air: A Review of Mental Health Struggles Among the Privileged
item.description: Titilade Oyemade reviews Femi Fowora’s memoir, The Weight of Air, which challenges stereotypes about mental health among the wealthy. The book explores Fowora’s candid journey with depression, panic a...

item.title: Study Reveals Sweeteners' Impact on Gut Bacteria When Combined with Medications and Food Additives
item.description: A recent study published in *Molecular Systems Biology* investigated the effects of 39 common sweeteners on gut microbiota, revealing significant interactions when combined with medications, food addi...

item.title: Alex Eala Remains Focused on Achieving Bigger Goals After Recent Career Progress
item.description: Filipina tennis player Alex Eala remains determined to reach greater milestones in her career, emphasising that her journey is only beginning despite her recent achievements. Based on the available in...
